title: Churn Analysis Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger churn analysis foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Churn Analysis Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Churn Analysis Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good churn analysis foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Churn Analysis Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
